constraints: Enhance verify_iso_smoketest.sh to perform a QEMU boot test if an ISO is present.
Use lightweight QEMU parameters (e.g., -nographic) to verify kernel/initramfs loading without a display.
Ensure the test includes a strict timeout to prevent infinite hangs.
Gracefully skip the test if QEMU or virtualization support is missing.
Update AUDIT_ACTION_PLAN.md to mark the VM boot test task as completed if the implementation is successful.
Do not modify core OS build logic.
